originContent: # go-fAST
translatedContent: # go-fAST

originContent: `go-fAST` is a super-fast Golang library designed for parsing, transforming, and generating JavaScript Abstract Syntax Trees (ASTs). This library provides a simple and efficient way to work with JavaScript ASTs in Go, enabling developers to perform a variety of tasks including code analysis and (de)obfuscation.
translatedContent: `go-fAST` 是一个超快速的 Golang 库，旨在解析、转换和生成 JavaScript 抽象语法树（AST）。该库提供了一种简单高效的方式在 Go 中处理 JavaScript AST，使开发者能够执行包括代码分析和（反）混淆在内的各种任务。

originContent: [![Discord Banner2](https://discord.com/api/guilds/1288989871498858496/widget.png?style=banner2)](https://discord.gg/wdJ4VcdrwK)
translatedContent: [![Discord Banner2](https://discord.com/api/guilds/1288989871498858496/widget.png?style=banner2)](https://discord.gg/wdJ4VcdrwK)

originContent: ## Features
translatedContent: ## 功能

originContent: - **Parsing**: Convert JavaScript code into its AST representation.
translatedContent: - **解析**：将 JavaScript 代码转换为其 AST 表示。

originContent: - **Transforming**: Apply transformations to JavaScript ASTs to modify code structures.
translatedContent: - **转换**：对 JavaScript AST 应用转换以修改代码结构。

originContent: - **Generating**: Generate JavaScript code from ASTs.
translatedContent: - **生成**：从 AST 生成 JavaScript 代码。

originContent: ## Installation
translatedContent: ## 安装

originContent: To use `go-fAST` in your Go project, you need to install it using `go get`:
translatedContent: 要在你的 Go 项目中使用 `go-fAST`，你需要使用 `go get` 安装：

originContent: ```sh
translatedContent: ```sh

originContent: go get github.com/t14raptor/go-fast
translatedContent: go get github.com/t14raptor/go-fast

originContent: ## Docs
translatedContent: ## 文档

originContent: [Documentation](https://yoghurtbot-io.gitbook.io/go-fast)
translatedContent: [文档](https://yoghurtbot-io.gitbook.io/go-fast)

translatedContent: ## 致谢

translatedContent: 我们衷心感谢以下个人和项目对本项目所做的宝贵贡献：

translatedContent: - **[@JustTalDevelops](https://github.com/JustTalDevelops)**：感谢其在代码生成边缘案例和美化打印方面提供的卓越帮助。

translatedContent: - **[@steakenthusiast](https://github.com/steakenthusiast)**：感谢其为项目起了一个富有创意且贴切的名字。

originContent: - **[goja](https://github.com/dop251/goja)**: For their parsing code that was instrumental in our implementation.
translatedContent: - **[goja](https://github.com/dop251/goja)**：感谢其解析代码，对我们的实现起到了关键作用。

originContent: - **[swc](https://swc.rs/)**: For their robust and efficient visiting API.
translatedContent: - **[swc](https://swc.rs/)**：感谢其强大高效的访问者API。

originContent: Your support and contributions have greatly enhanced the development of this project. Thank you!
translatedContent: 您的支持和贡献极大地促进了本项目的发展。谢谢！
